name: Grilled Orange Egg Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. With the navel at the bottom, slice off the top of the orange (or grapefruit) and carefully dig out all the pulp and fruit. Save the "orange cup" for later.
2. Crack the egg into a bowl with the milk, sugar, and cinnamon. Gently whisk the mixture with a fork until combined, but do not overmix. You want some lumps of smooth egg white in the final dish.
3. Place the egg mixture into the orange cup. Arrange the cups on a grilling stand near the embers (not directly on the fire).
4. Cook until the egg is set but not hard. Serve immediately and enjoy!
- This recipe was formatted for MM by Pegg Seevers on 5/15/96.
